description: Lisa clicks on the 'Flight Search' browser tab to return to the Webjet search results.
frame_description: Lisa moves her cursor to the top of the browser window to switch from the Askable tab to the Webjet tab.

description: The browser switches to the Webjet flight search results page.
frame_description: The screen updates to show a list of flight results from Maroochydore to London.

description: Lisa scrolls down the search results page to review the available flight options and prices.
frame_description: The flight results list moves vertically as the user scrolls.

description: Lisa clicks the browser's back button to return to the Webjet homepage.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the back arrow in the browser's navigation bar.

description: The browser navigates back to the Webjet homepage.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for flights, hotels & more
frame_description: The Webjet homepage loads, showing the main flight search widget.

description: Lisa clicks into the 'Leaving from' input field to start a new search.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for flights, hotels & more
frame_description: The cursor activates the origin search field in the flight booking widget.

description: A dropdown menu appears showing recent searches and popular airports.
frame_description: A list of airport suggestions appears below the 'Leaving from' field.

description: Lisa types 'brisbane' into the 'Leaving from' field.
frame_description: The text 'brisbane' appears character by character in the input field.

description: The autocomplete suggestions update to show airports matching 'brisbane'.
frame_description: The dropdown list filters to show Brisbane (BNE) as the top result.

description: Lisa selects 'Brisbane (BNE)' from the autocomplete list.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Brisbane airport option in the dropdown.

description: Lisa clicks into the 'Going to' input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the destination field and activates it.

description: A dropdown menu appears for the destination field.
frame_description: A list of suggested destinations appears below the 'Going to' field.

description: Lisa pauses to talk about her travel plans before typing the destination.
frame_description: The cursor idles near the destination field while the participant speaks.

description: Lisa types 'london' into the 'Going to' field.
frame_description: The text 'london' is entered into the destination search box.

description: The autocomplete suggestions update to show airports matching 'london'.
frame_description: The dropdown list filters to show London airports.

description: Lisa selects 'London, United Kingdom - All Airports (LON)' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the London all-airports option.

description: Lisa clicks on the 'Dates' field to open the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor activates the date selection field.

description: The calendar date picker modal opens.
frame_description: A calendar overlay appears on the screen.

description: Lisa pauses to consider her travel dates while looking at the calendar.
frame_description: The calendar is open but the user is not yet clicking on dates.

description: Lisa selects her departure and return dates in the calendar.
frame_description: The user clicks on specific dates (March 1st and March 22nd) in the calendar modal.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Done' button to confirm her date selection.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the confirmation button at the bottom of the date picker.

description: The date picker modal closes.
frame_description: The calendar overlay disappears, returning focus to the search widget.

description: Lisa pauses briefly before initiating the search.
frame_description: The cursor hovers near the search button while the user finishes her thought.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Search Flights' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the primary call-to-action button to find flights.

description: The page begins navigating to the search results, displaying a loading screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a loading state with the text 'Available airfares will be displayed shortly'.
